\section*{Reproducibility}
All code, configuration files and generated tables are available at
\todo{repository URL}. The pipeline is driven by a single YAML configuration
whose hash is recorded in every result artifact; every table in this paper is
generated programmatically from those artifacts by
\texttt{scripts/11\_build\_report\_assets.py}. Random seeds are fixed and
propagated to NumPy, Python, scikit-learn and PyTorch.
